gtocore.death.attack.blast_furnace.2: Employee %s tired to have a sauna in a blast furnace.

gtocore.lang.-1014137552: Expanded Multiblocks can install additional Hatches to get Bonuses
gtocore.lang.-1043308289: §aAfter installing this hatch, Overclock effect changes to a maximum of: for every 4 × power, recipe time ×14.29%§r
gtocore.lang.-1054816748: §aAfter installing this hatch, Overclock effect changes to a maximum of: for every 4 × power, recipe time ×50%§r
gtocore.lang.-1057438356: §aAfter installing this hatch, Overclock effect changes to a maximum of: for every 4 × power, recipe time ×25%§r
gtocore.lang.-1057587311: §aAfter installing this hatch, Overclock effect changes to a maximum of: for every 4 × power, recipe time ×20%§r
gtocore.lang.-1334423408: Built-in parallel processing - no Parallel Control Hatch required
gtocore.lang.-1344483012: Allows multiblock expansion to improve machine efficiency
gtocore.lang.-1820053883: Allows Thread Hatches to enable Multi-Threaded Recipe Parallelization
gtocore.lang.-626832261: Attach the Terminal to any side of a Chest or other Inventories like Crates. Afterwards you can use the Crafting Terminal to use Items from the Inventory to craft with.
gtocore.lang.-724709346: Represents whether this Hatch can be shared by multiple Multiblocks
gtocore.lang.1210838772: Can only process §bMV§r-Tier recipes and below
gtocore.lang.130790430: Allows the installation of Parallel Control Hatches
gtocore.lang.1435846884: Represents whether the Hatches can independently select Recipe Types, unrestricted by the Multiblocks configuration
gtocore.lang.1555553475: §aAfter installing this hatch, Overclock effect changes to a maximum of: for every 4 × power, recipe time ×33.33%§r
gtocore.lang.1616106897: Allows Laser Energy Hatches for Energy Input
gtocore.lang.3.2106472575: Fill with 481 T5 storage units to unlock unlimited storage
gtocore.lang.704665244: More aggressive overclocks, more powerful machines, and more extreme speeds!
gtocore.lang.735333575: §aAfter installing this hatch, Overclock effect changes to a maximum of: for every 4 × power, recipe time ×16.67%§r
gtocore.lang.740444711: §aAfter installing this hatch, Overclock effect changes to a maximum of: for every 4 × power, recipe time ×12.5%§r
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Affinity.0.748796838: Affinity as an efficient cause for the awakening of emotions. Symbolizes the human virtue of personal attractiveness.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Affinity.1.-181456105: It is associated to the planet Mercury, the letter T, and the number 5. It represents the principle of natural incentive as a modulating power of actions.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Affinity.2.-414558684: “Woman, thou art an ember in the fire; and thou, man, the wind that livens it.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Affinity.3.494236459: It promises illusions, passions, appetites, desires, love, hallucinations, recklessness, dangers that are ignored.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Alliance.0.262133699: Alliance as an act of communion between equals. Symbolizes the virtue of human affinity through identity.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Alliance.1.918282218: It is associated to the planet Venus, the letter E, and the number 6. It represents the principle of one’s own realization by means of association.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Alliance.2.-135406242: “Rejoice with the love of thy youth, and rejoice even more with the love of thine maturity.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Alliance.3.1122047849: It promises dealings with precision, lasting alliances, increasing of prosperity, progress, happy contingencies.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Art and Science.0.-47: Art and science as factors of individual evolution. Symbolizes the virtue of a human’s own discipline as an element of progress.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Art and Science.1.205: It is associated to the Sun, the letter I, and the number 1. It represents the principle of creation by means of applied knowledge.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Art and Science.2.207: “Behold the Promised Land before mine eyes; help me, oh foot, to arrive there.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Art and Science.3.-17: It promises sincere friendship, magnificent aids, probity, equity, imperative resources, compulsions, perversions, popularity, but not entirely edifying.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Avarice.0.1090936975: Avarice as a calculative selfish act. Symbolizes a twisted human virtue of the longing for power.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Avarice.1.-1891602085: It is associated to the planet Saturn, the letter S, and the number 8. It represents the principle of prevention.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Avarice.2.943442666: “Greedy is greed, quenched with miseries and unpleasantly abundant.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Avarice.3.-415506328: It promises usury, egotistical plans that bring remorse, great hopes and small results, danger of robbery, difficulties in preserving the place that is occupied or the acquired status.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Biplicity.0.-18171969: Biplicity as an act of sagacity. Symbolizes the human virtue of knowledge voluntarily induced.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Biplicity.1.-52930132: It is associated to the Moon, the letter J, and the number 2. It represents the principle of the antonymous as an element of comparison and selection.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Biplicity.2.149872929: “Virtuous woman, not all of those who see thy works can see thy virtues.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Biplicity.3.-18556981: It promises the influence of women in one’s affairs, wisdom and torpidity when resolving them, virtue and scandal, honesty and vice, chastity and corruption.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Chance.0.869871307: Chance as a law known by the instinct. Symbolizes the human virtue of transcendental knowledge.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Chance.1.282978092: It is associated to the planet Venus, the letter M, and the number 6. It represents the principle of the primary faculties as guidance in the way of life.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Chance.2.-1163377610: “There is a fruit in any labor, and there is a labor in any fruit.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Chance.3.-894915678: It promises retributions, compensations, satisfactory changes; opportunity for ranking ascension, success in real estate properties, thoughtless accomplishment of wishes; fortuitous attractions.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Communion.0.-11639557: Communion as an act of partnership and recognition. Symbolizes the human virtue of sharing.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Communion.1.-11397625: It is associated to the planet Mars, the letter H, and the number 9. It represents the principle of unity within diversity.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Communion.2.496607910: “Give a seed to the one who wants to sow and does not have it, and advice to the one who wants to succeed and does not know how.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Communion.3.42080720: It promises affection, tenderness, intimacy, affinity, correspondences, mutual protection against third parties, fights for common ideals.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Consummation.0.-15376: The consummation as an act of plenitude. Symbolizes the human virtue of one’s own conviction.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Consummation.1.-34464: It is associated to the planet Jupiter, the letter R, and the number 3. It represents the principle of determination of conduct.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Consummation.2.576538: “Drink the drops of thy cistern or the flowing of thy well.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Consummation.3.-17781: It promises achievements, science, victory, conclusions, resolutions, impossible loves, that which is already irremediable.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Contrition.0.-4241227: Contrition as an act of repentance. Symbolizes the human virtue of recognizing one’s own error.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Contrition.1.-4682825: It is associated to the planet Pluto, the letter A, and the number 1. It represents the principle of voluntary repair.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Contrition.2.15855223: “Do not sow an assortment of seeds in thine orchard, neither harvest them within thine heart.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Contrition.3.59552900: It promises lamentations, spiritual afflictions, unpleasantness, unsatisfied profit, acquisition of material wealth by means of moral suffering.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Cooperation.0.1015222: Cooperation as an act of collaboration in effort. Symbolizes the human virtue of knowing how to complement each other.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Cooperation.1.1883564: It is associated to the planet Neptune, the letter N, and the number 7. It represents the principle of reciprocity.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Cooperation.2.1088913: “There is no man without science, neither science without man.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Cooperation.3.-162190: It promises sincere affections, fulfilled promises, the vanishing of hopes without foundation; prosperity by means of death or mysterious causes, progress by application of arts or sciences.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Counseling.0.-1786070: Counseling as an act of prudent advice. Symbolizes the human virtue of reverence to knowledge and responsibility of what one knows.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Counseling.1.15503396: It is associated to the planet Venus, the letter U, and the number 6. It represents the principle of respect to established order.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Counseling.2.14986404: “Unto silver is likened the word uttered by the sage, yet unto gold is likened the one who listens and follows him.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Counseling.3.20813142: It promises judgement, judicial matters, relations with people of authority, dangerous enemies among those people; fortune in the field of weapons or the magistracy, danger of perfidies.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Deduction.0.-21358176: Deduction as an act of knowledge. Symbolizes the human virtue of knowing by means of one’s own inspiration.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Deduction.1.-10042150: It is associated to the Moon, the letter Q, and the number 2. It represents the principle of deduction as an element of illumination.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Deduction.2.-41863498: “To be resplendent in the light and the heat in the fire is now thy mission, and from now on.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Deduction.3.-89336940: It promises new lights, new teachings, spiritual afflictions, mature hopes, coming joys or sufferings, support of relatives; virtuous and lasting loves.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Disorientation.0.-301: Disorientation as an act of forbearance. Symbolizes the human virtue of acknowledgement and reflection.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Disorientation.1.8693: It is associated to the planet Mercury, the letter T, and the number 5. It represents the principle of association of ideas.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Disorientation.2.-190: “Paths are requested for a diligent foot, and tools for a laborious hand.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Disorientation.3.-119: It promises embarrassing situations, confusion of ideas, perplexity upon decisions, unexpected obstacles, probabilities of good and bad fortune, depending on one’s own inspiration towards one or the other.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Domesticity.0.-209746: Domesticity as an act of concord. Symbolizes the virtue of human domination by means of persuasion.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Domesticity.1.-175363: It is associated to the Moon, the letter B, and the number 2. It represents Nature’s peace, equilibrium of elements, pastoral joy.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Domesticity.2.1508609: “Let your eyes become youthful eyes, and let thy word become an elder’s prudence.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Domesticity.3.4221795: It promises remorse, indecisions, perplexities, timidity, pastoral life, advantageous affairs, enterprises that bring struggles but with satisfactory outcomes.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Evolution.0.-41181436: Evolution as a process of transformation. Symbolizes the human virtue of the successive awakening of the consciousness.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Evolution.1.-11488338: It is associated to the planet Venus, the letter E, and the number 6. It represents the principle of metamorphosis.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Evolution.2.-13504841: “The one who sows and the one who waters the sown are the same to the seed.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Evolution.3.-10140401: It promises detriments, setback of fortune, diminishing, affections that die, beings which are buried, danger of ruin because of fixation of ideas, adverse changes, painful events.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Examination.0.1147581: Examination as a heartening deliberation upon conclusion. Symbolizes the human virtue of proceeding with justice.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Examination.1.1439354: It is associated to the planet Mars, the letter Y, and the number 9. It represents the principle of free debate.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Examination.2.-234438: “Search around thy village and harvest the fallen grains, but do not search for resentments, neither collect misdemeanors.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Examination.3.1452047: It promises speculations, enquiries, imputations, treasons; occult enemies; defamation.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Exchange.0.1478168058: Exchange as an act of reciprocal convenience. Symbolizes the virtue of human life in society.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Exchange.1.1837884477: It is associated to the planet Jupiter, the letter C, and the number 3. It represents individual expansion by means of commercial conviviality.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Exchange.2.-205793291: “Reap thy land carefully, but do not harvest your goods with avarice.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Exchange.3.-557463159: It promises social life, intercommunications, commerce, traffic, variety, discussion, although many times without solution.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Fragility.0.-20968806: The Fulminated Tower. Punishment, terrible fall. Avoid this date.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Fragility.2.-57293742: Seventh Hour of Apollonius: “Fire comforts inanimate beings, and if any priest, a sufficiently purified man, steals the fire and then projects it, if he mixes this fire with sacred oil and consecrates it, then he will achieve the healing of all sicknesses by simply applying it to the afflicted areas (here the initiate sees that his material wealth is threatened and his business fails).”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Fragility.3.225960713: “Light at dawn, light of midday, light of nightfall, what is important is that it is light.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Fragility.4.108952081: Predicts unexpected accidents, tempests, commotions, deaths; benefits because of concepts from good and bad circumstances; reciprocity in love and hatred, in indifference and in zeal, in treason and in loyalty.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Friendship.0.14977717: Friendship as an action of devotion in affection. Symbolizes the human virtue of veneration.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Friendship.1.63958400: It is associated to the planet Uranus, the letter L, and the number 4. It represents the principle of pure love.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Grief.0.2115010081: Grief as an act of moral affliction. Symbolizes the virtue of human tribulation in its depurating action.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Grief.1.-1454723446: It is associated to the planet Saturn, the letter G, and the number 8. It represents the principle of the knowledge of one’s own insufficiency.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Grief.2.-1213775814: “That which is now comes from that which has been, and what has been is what shall be now.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Grief.3.-880568450: It promises alarms, consternations, melancholies, sadness, obstacles, unexpected events.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Hope.0.903067318: The Star of Hope. Signifies to hope and wait.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Hope.2.507239813: Eighth Hour of Apollonius: “The astral virtues of the elements, of the seeds of every genre.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Hope.3.1999940264: “Some men require signs in order to believe, others require wisdom in order to act, but the hopeful heart bears everything within its hopes.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Hope.4.-799244230: It predicts Intuition, support, illumination, births, brief afflictions and brief satisfactions, displeasures and reconciliations, privations; abandonments and benefits.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Imagination.0.4404829: Imagination as a heartened rejoicing act. Symbolizes the human virtue of the expression of contentment.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Imagination.1.-165724: It is associated to the planet Neptune, the letter N, and the number 7. It represents the creative principle of induced ideas.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Imagination.2.-125355: “Joyfulness of my heart, beautify my face.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Imagination.3.-121862: It promises satisfactions, contentment, decency, modesty, enjoyments, parties, pleasant preparations, violent passions, forbidden loves, divorce, prosperous businesses.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Immortality.0.-101523: Death and resurrection. Transformations, indicates total change.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Immortality.2.-165927: Fourth Hour of Apollonius: “The neophyte will wander at night among the sepulchers, will experience the horror of visions, and will be submitted to magic and goethia (this means that the disciple will see that he is being attacked by millions of black magicians within the astral plane. Those tenebrous magicians attempt to drive the disciple away from the luminous path).”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Immortality.3.1477134: “Night has passed and a new day has arrived, then thou shall be dressed with weapons of light.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Immortality.4.9249476: Guarantees disappointments, disillusions, death of affections, refusals for that which is solicited, collapse, pure enjoyments and gladness for the soul, improvements with painful enjoyment, help of friends; renewal of conditions, the good ones for the worse and the bad ones for the better.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Impediments.0.-130325: Impediments as incentives for the developing of one’s own efficiency. Symbolizes the virtue of human reaction against the opposition.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Impediments.1.5244820: It is associated to the planet Uranus, the letters CH, and the number 4. It represents the principle of depuration as an element of progress.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Impediments.2.1329292: “Do not pass merciless judgment, neither have mercy without judgment.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Impediments.3.-101082: It promises expectations, promises, domestic devices, restrictions, inferior quality trading and a position not always beneficial for both parties.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Indecision.3.20054297: “Thou art giving me labor, oh Lord, and fortitude with it.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Indecision.4.92747052: Privilege and obligations in the relations of sexes. Antagonism of forces. Separations and divorces. Possession of that which is pursued and ardent desires which are fulfilled, where some of them satisfy and others disappoint.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Initiation.0.-1811947: Initiation as a revivifying act. Symbolizes the virtue of progressive actualization of human powers.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Initiation.1.13439132: It is associated to the planet Mars, the letter H, and the number 9. It represents the principle of developing one’s own virtues.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Initiation.2.11416830: “Pleasant is the studio, pleasant it is to sing, pleasant it is to listen.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Initiation.3.30365858: It promises births, new beginnings, premises, forthcoming fortune, success in businesses, dissipations, declinations.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Innovation.0.-3068427: Innovation as an element of evolution. Symbolizes the virtue of undeviating human effort.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Innovation.1.-1249216: It is associated to the planet Neptune, the letter F, and the number 7. It represents the principle of self-inspiration as guidance for activities.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Innovation.2.18014294: “Length of days upon thy right hand and works and honor upon thy left.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Innovation.3.-6758700: It promises inventions, new enterprises, temptations, temerity, findings­—some fortunate, others disconcerting.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Inspiration.0.2074157: The radiant Sun. Success, good luck, the Philosophical Stone.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Inspiration.2.-118673: Tenth Hour of Apollonius: “The doors of heaven open and man comes out of his lethargy (this is the number ten of the second great Initiation of Major Mysteries, that allows the initiate to travel in the ethereal body. This is the wisdom of John the Baptist).
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Inspiration.3.2025318: “Take the shield of thy faith and advance with a determined step, no matter if the wind is in thy favor or all the winds are against thy favor.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Inspiration.4.-357128: It predicts the increment of power, success in determination, joy in the acts that are performed, benefits for the concept of personal efforts and efforts of others, inheritances, clarity in that which is desired and fire that consumes the desired.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Justice.0.1617999860: The arcanum of Job. Sufferings, tests, pains.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Justice.3.962322126: “Thou shalt edify an altar within thy heart, but thou shalt not make an altar of thy heart.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Justice.4.1880638756: Guarantees retributions, punishments and rewards, gratitudes and ungratefulness, compensations for given services.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Magnificence.0.293417: Magnificence as an act of material communion. Symbolizes the virtue of evidencing a human’s own value.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Magnificence.1.-47113: It is associated to the planet Mercury, the letter D, and the number 5. It represents the principle of ostentation as a cause of discussion.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Magnificence.2.-18934: “Exhaust the resources of thine intelligence, but do not exhaust those of thine heart.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Magnificence.3.133964: It promises dangers because of choleric or loquacious excess, ostentation of material elements, litigations, luxury as a cause of triumph or failure, oppositions or cooperations between people of equal hierarchy.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Passion.0.-1927936861: Typhon Baphomet. Failure in love. Announces dangers.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Passion.2.1899519861: Sixth Hour of Apollonius: “Here it is necessary to remain quiet, still, due to fear (this signifies the terrible ordeal of the Guardian of the Threshold, before whom a lot of courage is needed in order to overcome him).”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Passion.3.-454339821: “They made me the keeper of the vineyards; but mine own vineyard have I not kept.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Passion.4.1852323649: It predicts controversies, passions, fatalities; prosperity through legality and fatality; noxious affections for the one who feels them, and for the one who is affected by them; vehement anxiety and violent situations.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Patrimony.0.-46348738: Patrimony as an act of continuity. Symbolizes the human virtue of possession by inheritance.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Patrimony.1.-10499828: It is associated to the Sun, the letter P, and the number 1. It represents the principle of natural prosecution.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Patrimony.2.632492209: “The one who is content in the little will open the doors of plethora.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Patrimony.3.894506120: It promises friendship bequest, inheritances by own rights, donations, testaments, traditions, forefathers, family, conjugal affinity; for a man: danger because of a woman; for a woman: danger of seduction.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Persuasion.0.20064251: The tame lion. Favor of the law. Let there be no fear. Mars.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Persuasion.2.-1124934: Second Hour of Apollonius: “The abysses of the fire and the astral virtues form a circle through (around) the dragons and the fire (studies of the occult forces).”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Persuasion.3.-1086606: “Joyful in hope, suffered in tribulation, be thou constant in thy prayer.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Persuasion.4.19060643: Guarantees control of the direction which is followed that leads towards the dominion of the elements; vitality, rejuvenation, acquisition, and loss of friends because of family matters; pains, obstacles, jealousy, treason and resignation in order to bear the disappointments.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Preeminence.0.1192962: Preeminence as acknowledgment of superiority. Symbolizes the human virtue of acceptation of hierarchical order.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Preeminence.1.1150932: It is associated to the planet Venus, the letter M, and the number 6. It represents the principle of power and voluntary obedience.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Preeminence.2.-169344: “If utmost in dignity and power, be then utmost in thy merits.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Preeminence.3.4585135: It promises advantages, triumph, pomposity, superiority, sincerity, surprising loves.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Presentiment.0.-12010: Presentiment as an instinctual knowledge. Symbolizes the human virtue of anticipated knowledge of what shall occur.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Presentiment.1.132246: It is associated to the planet Uranus, the letter L, and the number 4. It represents the principle of prescience as a natural faculty.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Presentiment.2.198925: “Do not be a man with open eyes to covetousness, nor a woman with open ears to flattery.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Presentiment.3.-52690: It promises a very well-retributive work, application, reflection, attraction, sympathy, seduction, threat of ruin, mortifying affections.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Regeneration.0.750415: Regeneration as a reiterative act. Symbolizes the human virtue of remembering the past and preventing the future.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Regeneration.1.-83984: It is associated to the planet Mars, the letter O, and the number 9. It represents the principle of memorization and visualization.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Regeneration.2.-71307: “Everything is beautiful in its time, and everything is flavorful in its ripeness.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Regeneration.3.100484: It promises spiritual resurrection, physical rejuvenation, reconsideration of that which was and some first-fruits of that which will be, vigor, decrepitude, something from infancy and from elderhood, influence of relatives in loving matters, breakage and abandonment.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Resurrection.0.-52316: The resurrection of the dead. Favorable changes, take advantage of them. Put an end to weaknesses.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Resurrection.2.899926: Eleventh Hour of Apollonius: “The Angels, Cherubim, and Seraphim fly with the sound of whirring wings; there is rejoicing in heaven; the earth and the sun which surge from Adam awaken (this process belongs to the great Initiations of Major Mysteries, where only the terror of the Law reigns).”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Resurrection.3.-13706: “Flower in the apple tree, fruit in the vineyard sown with prudence.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Resurrection.4.-78057: It predicts harmonious choices, fortunate initiatives, labor, profit. Compensations because of good and because of bad. Loyal friends that annul the action of traitorous friends. Jealousy for the good that is enjoyed. Afflictions because of loss.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Retribution.0.-503295: The Wheel of Fortune. Good business, changes.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Retribution.3.-110265: When we make a petition, oftentimes the angels answer us by showing a clock. The disciple must fix his sight on the hour of the clock. This is the clock of destiny. The answer is in the hour. In esoteric allegory, one is always answered by the clock. We have to learn how to understand the clock.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Retribution.4.7858475: First Hour of Apollonius: “Transcendental study of occultism.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Retribution.5.-167660: “The knowledge that thou buyest with thine experience is expensive, and the knowledge that thou lacks and thou need to buy is even more expensive.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Retribution.6.1135081: Guarantees good and bad fortune, elevation and descents, legitimate possessions and doubtful possessions; recommendations of past contingencies and circumstances which are repeated in a distinct way.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Revelation.0.-7143799: Revelation as an act of unveiling the hidden. Symbolizes the human virtue of making intelligible that which was unintelligible.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Revelation.1.29076852: It is associated to the planet Mercury, the letter D, and the number 5. It represents the principle of manifestation.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Revelation.2.-1524591: “As the metals are tested in the fire, likewise the value of a man is tested in the mouth of who praises or censures him.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Revelation.3.-3376978: It promises declarations, authorizations, messages, messengers, contradictory news, voyages, adversity, loquacity, violation of secrets.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Rivalry.0.827186004: Rivalry as a proof of competition between opponents. Symbolizes the human virtue of one’s own esteem.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Rivalry.1.1566327965: It is associated to the planet Jupiter, the letter C, and the number 3. It represents the principle of skill.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Rivalry.2.-370849925: “For a just man falls seven times, and if he indeed is just, seven times he rises up again.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Rivalry.3.-669295130: It promises delicate circumstances, critical moments, oppositions, conjunction of events, criticism, debates, what is fatal, the fulfillment of destiny.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Solitude.0.1427567657: Solitude as an act of heartening concentration. Symbolizes the human virtue of interior contemplation.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Solitude.1.495369125: It is associated to the planet Neptune, the letter F, and the number 7. It represents the principle of isolation.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Solitude.2.-181723109: “Pay what thou owe; pay tax to the tax collector, pay worship to the worshiper, and pay honors to the honorable.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Solitude.3.-207706551: It promises reserve, precaution, retirement, inability, vigilance, economy, good behavior, voluntary or unavoidable retirement from social life.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Speculation.0.-953740: Speculation as an act of appraisal for value. Symbolizes the human virtue of reasoning.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Speculation.1.-191461: It is associated to the planet Mercury, the letters LL, and the number 5. It represents the principle of directed diligence.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Speculation.2.-127534: “May thine eyes see without fear and thine hands with love.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Speculation.3.1180463: It promises intelligent laboring; beneficial learning; abundance of material goods; generosity, liberality; favorable news on monetary matters; right calculation for undertakings.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Temperance.2.12495858: Fifth Hour of Apollonius: “The superior waters of heaven (during this time the disciple learns to be pure and chaste because he comprehends the value of his seminal liquor).”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Temperance.3.-7702239: “Thou shalt not be as straw before the wind; neither shalt thou be as the wind before the straw.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Temperance.4.-1669092: Predicts enmities, reciprocal affections, obligations, combinations, chemical combinations, and combining of interests; afflicted loves, devoted loves, betrayed loves; things that remain and things that depart, the first are in order to leave, the second are in order to return.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Testimony.0.-7223240: Testimony as an irrecusable evidence. Symbolizes the human virtue of verification for proof.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Testimony.1.150528040: It is associated to the planet Jupiter, the letter K, and the number 3. It represents the principle of demonstration as an element of conviction.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Testimony.2.-41667733: “Place thy intentions as witnesses before thyself; however, place thy works as witnesses before others.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Testimony.3.107977267: It promises conformity, approximations, comparison, banquets, traveling, delayed matrimonies, presumed or real adultery, unforeseen or foreseen arrivals.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Apostolate.0.-259: Sacrifice. Tests and pains. The Arcanum A.Z.F. takes us out of pain.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Apostolate.2.1762: Third Hour of Apollonius: “The serpents, the dogs, and the fire (Sexual Magic, work with the Kundalini).”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Apostolate.3.2123: “Even though the sun makes thou fatigued during the day and the moon makes thou grievous during the night, thou shalt not take thy feet unto the slippery, neither thou shall sleep when thou art on guard.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Apostolate.4.-205: Guarantees contrarieties, anguish, downfalls; material loss in some conditions of life and profit in others; presentiments which enliven and presentiments which discourage.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Argonaut.0.-13746: The argonaut in the act of sailing in search of the unknown. Symbolizes the virtue of a human’s own inspiration.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Argonaut.1.-16869: It is associated to the planet Neptune, the letter V, and the number 7. It represents the valiant man who confronts the dangers of the unknown.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Argonaut.2.108640: “My boat is sailing, sailing persistently; sailing by night, sailing by day.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Argonaut.3.103276: It promises absences, emigrations, abandonment, changes, domestic discords, something that is acquired and much that is lost.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Dispenser.0.-1532: The dispenser in the act of distributing grace. Symbolizes the human virtue of mercy.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Dispenser.1.15231: It is associated to the planet Uranus, the letter S, and the number 4. It represents the principle of human providence.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Dispenser.2.16010: “Approach us, foreigner, and eat thereof from our bread and from the sauce of my people.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Dispenser.3.-3496: It promises noble considerations, importance, celebrity, generosity, birth, fortune by means of intelligently directed enterprises; abundant laboring and genius in order to make it useful.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Emperor.3.-174688: “Give blessings unto the labor of thy hands, and place thy heart into thy thoughts.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Emperor.4.-116505: Guarantees material gains, having the basis for higher enterprises, favorable results on spent efforts and troubled conditions in order to achieve them; friends are simultaneously a help and obstacle. Fate is proper and adverse at the same time.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Empress.0.8140034: The Divine Mother. Material and spiritual production.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Empress.3.3888192: “Thy loom is weaving cloth for thou to use and cloth that thou shalt not use.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Empress.4.1052390: Multiplication of material goods, prosperity in business, abundance, wealth, success; obstacles which must be defeated, and satisfaction in proportion to efforts made while we are defeating them.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Hermit.3.12395400: “Rise unto the mount and contemplate the Promised Land. But, thou shalt not go over thither.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Hermit.4.12228730: It guarantees science in order for the making of discoveries; a method for when making them; caution when being served by them; advantageous associations and conceited associations; friends who help and who obstruct; light of reason and light of intuition, the first light for the immediate and the second light for that which will be.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Hierarch.0.154593: Rigor, the law. Karma, Mars, war.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Hierarch.3.891665: “I have heard of thee by the hearing of the ear, but now mine eye seeth thee, and my heart feeleth thee.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Hierarch.4.-57689: Freedom and restrictions, new experiences, acquisition of advantageous teachings, love and love affairs, journeys of frustrated prosperity. Propitious friends and friends who are of a sinister augury; beings and things that come and go, those who come in order to leave, those who go in order to return.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Magician.3.-13358: “Be thou in thy deeds as thou art in thy thoughts.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Magician.4.615800: It promises dominion of material obstacles, new social relations, happy initiatives, the concourse of loyal friends who aid the development of projects, and jealous friends who obstruct it.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Plower.0.45149831: The plower is in the act of cultivating the earth and his consciousness. Symbolizes the virtue of a human’s self-realization.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Plower.1.17476580: It is associated to the action of the planet Mercury, the letter T, the number 5. It represents the elemental intelligence in its labor of knowing how to harvest the fruits of experience.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Plower.2.-4228982: “My mill is grinding flour for me and flour for my neighbor.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Plower.3.-1882125: It promises powerful friends, the necessity of their help, and the ability to attain it if one has faith in friendship. It signifies elevation by means of those friends and one’s own willpower.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Priestess.0.-2060: The wife of The Magician. Occult science. Favorable.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Priestess.3.-2120: “Winds and waves always go in favor of the one who knows how to sail.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Priestess.4.-7826: Attractions and repulsions, loss and profit, ascensions and descents; favorable inspirations to the initiative and the secret opposition from secondary ones who try to stop that initiative going towards a good goal.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Prodigy.0.-133495: The prodigy in the act of consummation. Symbolizes the human virtue of creating what is astounding and which searches the marvelous.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Prodigy.1.-205864: It is associated to the planet Saturn, the letter X, and the number 8. It represents the action of time as justice and power of manifestation.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Prodigy.2.5774132: “A time to rend, and a time to sew; a time to keep silence, and a time to speak.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Prodigy.3.-130211: It promises episodes that are fulfilled, threatening dangers, surprising events, unthought teachings.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Return.0.12818812: The truth, the Crown of Life. Triumph. Everything comes out well. Power, strength, good luck.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Return.2.-1666009: “There is a thirteenth hour; this is the hour of liberation.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Return.3.18236163: “The sun ariseth and the sun goeth down and it hasteth to its place where it was born.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Return.4.-1917012: Predicts longevity, inheritances, notability, delight of honest enjoyments, rivals that dispute the affections, friends that care for us, obstacles and aptitude in order to defeat them, uncertain situations and contingencies that clarify them.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Tree of Life-Shif: This modpack does not use the Waite or Thoth Tarot decks,
but instead employs a self-constructed deck,
which may differ significantly from conventional systems.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Tree of Life.0.-8: Rooted in Ein Sof, ten shine through realms
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Tree of Life.1.-1: Three pillars hold, love and justice balance
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Tree of Life.2.-5: Four worlds flow, each shapes creation
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Tree of Life.3.42: Wisdom and insight birth all; love nourishes
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Tree of Life.4.-1: Twenty-two paths link Sephiroth; Tarot reveals truth
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Tree of Life.5.-7: Crown to Kingdom cycles, light flows endlessly
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Tree of Life.6.81: Love shapes all forms; unite to return
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Tree of Life.7.-1: Holy Script holds the key; Divine Presence dwells
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Unexpected.0.3619: The unexpected in the act of becoming manifested. Symbolizes the virtue of subconscious human processes.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Unexpected.1.-161: It is associated to the planet Mars, the letter Y, and the number 9. It represents inner life as a determining cause of the outer.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Unexpected.2.-128: “Neither excess honey to sweeten, nor vainglory to thrive.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Unexpected.3.-852: It promises conditioned triumphs, surprises, conjurations, treasons, findings, discoveries, some of them tardy.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Weaver.0.60321569: The weaver in the act of cultivating domestic virtues. Symbolizes the diligent woman as keeper of home and honor.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Weaver.1.42193513: It is associated with the action of the planet Venus, the letter U, and the number 6. It represents the elemental intelligence in its labor of applying exertion to the fruits of learned things.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Weaver.2.55461990: “My loom is weaving net after net; a cloth for my honor and cloth to honor.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-The Weaver.3.-7278562: It promises organized economy, chastity in maternity, feminine protection and good performance of obligations.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Thought.0.-1657951537: Thought as a creative element. Symbolizes the human virtue of giving sensible shape to that whose shape is intelligible.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Thought.1.-1203277572: It is associated to the planet Saturn, the letter Ñ, and the number 8. It represents the creative principle of self-edification.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Thought.2.-633547348: “Overcome suspicion wisely, and enjoy what is yours in hope.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Thought.3.-1051230933: It promises projects, deliberation, resolutions, determinations, mutual understanding, fulfillment of what is desired after arduous struggles, by means of a person of the opposite sex.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Transmutation.0.-1221: The Fool, madness. Total demoralization towards evil. The magic key, the rune Olin. Antithesis, enemies of Hiram Abiff.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Transmutation.2.-6176: Twelfth Hour of Apollonius: “The towers of fire disturb (this is the triumphant entrance of the master into the limitless bliss of Nirvana, or better, the master’s renunciation of the bliss of Nirvana for the love of humanity, where then he is converted into a Bodhisattva of compassion).”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Transmutation.3.-8723: “My soul does not enter into His secret, neither my ship into His port.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Transmutation.4.16619: It predicts exclusion from something that is enjoyed, frustration when trying to achieve what is wanted. Ruin in relation to that which we boast of. It is danger of isolation, perfidious gifts, deceitful promises, disillusions; the end of some things and the beginning of others.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Triumph.0.892686935: The Chariot of War. Wars, struggles, atonement, pain, bitterness.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Triumph.3.-210361829: “When science shall enter into thy heart and wisdom shall be sweet unto thy soul, then ask and it shall be granted unto thee.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Triumph.4.1823750430: Guarantees magnetic power, well-aimed intellection (union of intellect and intuition); justice and reparations, honor and dishonour, achievement of that which is pursued with determination, satisfactions and disappointments.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Twilight.0.-119629864: Occult enemies. Hidden enemies jump out at any moment. Illnesses, no business.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Twilight.2.-129560527: Ninth Hour of Apollonius: “Here nothing is finished yet. The initiate increases his perception until he surpasses the limits of the solar system, beyond the zodiac. He arrives at the threshold of the infinite. He reaches the limits of the intelligible world. The Divine Light is revealed unto him and with all of this, new fears and dangers also appear (it is the study of the Minor Mysteries, the nine arcades on which the student must ascend).”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Twilight.3.2040035390: “May thy charity be an inexhaustible granary, and thy patience no less inexhaustible than thy charity.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Twilight.4.1514955007: It predicts instability, inconstancy, ambush, confusion, changes, uncertain situations, long deliberations, unexpected impediments, tardy results, apparent triumphs and failings.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Uncertainty.0.-814346: Uncertainty in the act of deliberation. Symbolizes the virtue of a human’s own determination.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Uncertainty.1.-134060: It is associated to the planet Pluto, the letter Z, and the number 1. It represents judgment as a determinant cause of acts.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Uncertainty.2.-106846: “Do not seek in others for what is in thee; neither seek in thee for what is in others.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Uncertainty.3.-149963: It promises delays, obstacles, contrarieties, mysteries to be solved and science to solve them.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Uneasiness.0.-3537266: Uneasiness as an act of disheartened attitude. Symbolizes the human virtue of always seeking for the best.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Uneasiness.1.-1718433: It is associated to the planet Mercury, the letters LL, and the number 5. It represents the principle of urban life.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Uneasiness.2.63745565: “The bows of the mighty ones were broken, and the bows of the weak were fitted with strength.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Uneasiness.3.-9530082: It promises indignation, violence, group of people in motion, bountiful family, puppy loves, joyful in the opposite sense.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Versatility.0.1251602: Versatility as an act of reciprocity. It symbolizes the human virtue of correspondence in equivalents.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Versatility.1.1894571: It is associated to the planet Uranus, the letter S, and the number 4. It represents the principle of permutation as element of prosperity.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Versatility.2.1943709: “Pleasant is the work to whom labors with contentment, and pleasant is the leisure to the one who deserves it.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Versatility.3.6769396: It promises removal, changes, new affections, rivalry in loves and undertakings, vicissitudes, but some for the better.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Zeal.0.1063841869: Zeal as an heartening, exalted expression. Symbolizes the human virtue of a fervent longing.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Zeal.1.-1845295504: It is associated to the Sun, the letter A, and the number 1. It represents the inner fire principle.
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Zeal.2.-966478443: “Fortitude is wisdom, and power the longing that moves it.”
gtocore.lang.Tarot-Zeal.3.-765579582: It promises extreme passions, fetching temper; rage, animosity, enterprises that requires fights; conquests because of vigor, success in matters of love.
gtocore.lang.absolute_baryonic_perfectio: This ultimately creates not just stable baryonic matter, but most importantly, absolutly purified water.
gtocore.lang.algae_farm.0.-1391471166: As one of the most primitive plant species, algae often goes unnoticed
gtocore.lang.area_destruction_tools.5.75: Be sure to remind other players in the multiplayer game!
gtocore.lang.bedrock_drilling_rig.1.7750: Each drilling operation challenges the law of physics
gtocore.lang.charge_bomb.1.-148568763: You can also feed it to the Entropinnyum...
gtocore.lang.clarifier_purification_unit: Filter blocks may clog after processing certain amounts of Water
gtocore.lang.compound_distillation_tower: The raw oil's darkness, cracks into fragments of light here
gtocore.lang.cosmic_celestial_spire_of_c: Consumes 2^(overclocks * 4 + 10) mana each time, boosting condensation efficiency by 2^(overclocks * 5)
gtocore.lang.culturing_tank.0.-381854687: GregTech set its sights on alien algae from Tau Ceti
gtocore.lang.door_of_create.2.64929571: Rotating in non-Euclidean geometry, the ring portal connects the boundaries of reality and creation
gtocore.lang.electric_cooking.0.-2137613: I am literally the Electric Smoker
gtocore.lang.element_copying.0.-21781775: Quantum-level elemental replication, creating matter from nothing.
gtocore.lang.entropy_flux_engine.1.17701: Creating matter from nothing, the physicist's ultimate desire
gtocore.lang.eye_of_harmony.0.-924139371: Creates a microverse to gather resources from within.
gtocore.lang.eye_of_harmony.7.-490353156: Overclocks are be adjusted via programmed circuits
gtocore.lang.fabulous_pool.0.646454139: Stores up to 1,000 standard mana pools
gtocore.lang.fast_neutron_breeder.13.-18: Consume Particle Source to provide initial flux: Sb-Be 10keV, Pu-Be 100keV, Cf-252 1MeV
gtocore.lang.fast_neutron_breeder.3.-208: Neutron flux can be increased by inputting Particle Source or during recipe operation
gtocore.lang.field_extruder_factory.0.89: Shape materials into a myriad of forms
gtocore.lang.field_extruder_factory.1.-1: Quantum force field allows for precise control, letting metals to flow freely into molds
gtocore.lang.field_extruder_factory.2.-1: From gears to pipes, screws to bearings, all components form in an instant
gtocore.lang.field_extruder_factory.5.18: Revolutionary breakthrough in the creation of components
gtocore.lang.flocculation_purification_u: Uses a flocculant (Polyaluminium Chloride) to remove microscopic contaminants,
including dust, microplastics, and other pollutants, forming larger clumps for easier filtration.
All Polyaluminium Chloride will be consumed while running
For every 100,000mB Polyaluminium Chloride consumed = Success Rate increases by 10%
If the Polyaluminium Chloride isn't a multiple of 100,000mB, apply the Success Rate Penalty:
Success Rate = Success Rate * 2 ^ (-10 * Overflow Ratio)
gtocore.lang.giant_flotation_tank.5.-715: Safety First — Stay Alert, Follow Procedures!
gtocore.lang.heater_machine.1.-333321418: Stop heating up when the front side is blocked.
gtocore.lang.heater_machine.4.-394704169: When the machine overheats, it will
gtocore.lang.heavy_rolling.3.801910520: 'Dual-Vector Foil Production Mode' — just kidding, probably
gtocore.lang.high_energy_laser_lathe.3.-: Laser paths like light tapestry, weaving precise patterns on the surface of materials.
gtocore.lang.high_energy_laser_purificat: The sixth step of water purification is catching any residual anions in the water, which may cause electrical failures in further water purification.
Lens replacement requests will occur at random intervals between 6-12 seconds.
The lens required can be seen in the GUI.
gtocore.lang.hyper_cube_machine.1.188391: Use the §bCoordinate Card§r to bind a storage block
gtocore.lang.industrial_flotation_cell.1: Using pine oil flotation, the workshop always smells like essential balm
gtocore.lang.industrial_flotation_cell.3: Note: Always ensure workplace safety — stay alert to potential hazards!
gtocore.lang.kuangbiao_giant_nuclear_fus: There are two types of modules: §eHigh-Energy Modules§r and §eOverclock Modules§r
For each installed High-Energy Module, the reactor's heat capacity is doubled
High-Energy Modules must be installed in order and the same module cannot be installed repeatedly
High-Energy Modules can increase the Heat Capacity a total of four times
Imprisoning the power of Star within steel
Overclock Modules allow the installation of Overclock & Thread Hatches
Only one Overclock Module is allowed to be installed
The first four previews in EMI corresponds to §eFusion Tier 2-5§r
The last preview in EMI shows the §eOverclock Module§r
If there is a conflict between the High-Energy Module and the Overclock Module, install the High-Energy Module first, then the Overclock Module
gtocore.lang.large_space_station.1.-8421: Provides a protected space for machines against harsh environments such as space radiation
gtocore.lang.large_space_station.12.5386: Energy and Fluid Consumption will increase based on the amount of §bExpansion Modules§r
gtocore.lang.large_space_station.14.-439: Distilled Water: 15mB * (1 + Amount of Expansion Modules)
gtocore.lang.large_space_station.15.-142: Rocket Fuel: 15mB * (1 + Amount of Expansion Modules)
gtocore.lang.large_space_station.17.-138: Energy consumption increase is related to the specific types and quantities of Expansion Modules
gtocore.lang.large_space_station.19.2520: §bCore Module§r: The main module of the Space Station. Must be installed; only allowed once.
gtocore.lang.large_space_station.2.-9276: The interior of the space station provides breathable air for players
gtocore.lang.large_space_station.20.9326: §bConnection Module§r: Connects the Core Module to Expansion Modules
gtocore.lang.large_space_station.3.-1643: Wireless Dimension Repeater functionality: Based on the installed Integral Frameworks
gtocore.lang.large_space_station.4.-1916: Expansion modules can be installed externally to increase internal space and add additional functionality
gtocore.lang.large_space_station.8.-1509: §bExpansion Modules§r can only be installed in fixed positions
gtocore.lang.large_space_station.9.-1266: The position for §bExpansion Modules§r can be highlighted using the UI button
gtocore.lang.large_steam_circuit_assembl: Consumes Circuits to engrave it - only that Circuit can be crafted
Requires a Large Steam Input Hatch for §6HV§r-Tier recipes
gtocore.lang.leap_forward_one_blast_furn: We are marching on a great road!
gtocore.lang.magnetic_energy_reaction_fu: Perfectly uniting creation and recycling with electric arcs.
gtocore.lang.mana_amplifier_hatch.2.-132: The current recipe will run with Perfect Overclocks.

Encode Patterns with Wildcards in the Pattern Terminal to use
The Buffer will automatically generate all craftable recipes
For example, encode a §6Wildcard Ingot -> Wildcard Plate§r recipe
The Buffer will automatically generate all craftable §6Ingot -> Plate§r recipes like §6Iron Ingot -> Iron Plate§r, §6Gold Ingot -> Gold Plate§r, etc.
Note: When generating, the Buffer will check whether the Recipe Type matches the stored Circuit/Mold, etc. in the Recipes
Mismatched Recipes will not be generated
Set Blacklist Materials in the Buffer to skip Recipe Generation for specific Materials
